# AI Residency

> Talent placement service connecting vetted AI students and recent graduates from Australia's top universities (UNSW, USYD, UMelb, Monash) with companies needing 4-12 week AI expertise stints. Founded by Gus Neill, ex-Uber Strategy and Operations.

## Key facts
- Day rates from AUD $30/hour
- Placements 4-12 weeks
- Acceptance rate: fewer than 1 in 100 applicants
- 3-stage vetting: application & screen, real-world AI build challenge, culture interview with references
- Coverage: Australia only (AU)
- First week trial: no-questions-asked refund or replacement
- 2 weeks notice to cancel after the trial week
- Onsite, hybrid, or fully remote (your choice)

## Pages
- [Home](https://tryairesidency.com/): product overview, vetting process, featured talent, FAQ, contact
- [Pricing](https://tryairesidency.com/pricing.md): structured pricing for AI agents
